record.field: Show me the APRs for invoices

# This server action will show the account.partial.reconciliation records related to an invoice apr_ids = apr_obj = env['account.partial.reconcile'] am_obj = env['account.move'] act = { 'name': 'Account Partial Reconcile', 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'res_model': 'account.partial.reconcile', 'target': 'current', 'view_mode': 'tree,form'}
accounts = [] accounts.append(record.partner_id.property_account_receivable_id) accounts.append(record.partner_id.property_account_customer_advance_id) accounts.append(record.partner_id.property_account_payable_id) accounts.append(record.partner_id.property_account_supplier_advance_id)
for aml in record.move_id.line_ids.filtered(lambda l: l.account_id in accounts): if aml.account_id.reconcile: apr_ids |= aml.matched_debit_ids | aml.matched_credit_ids
act['domain'] = [('id', 'in', apr_ids.ids)] action = act
Show me the reconciled AMLs for Invoices

# This server action will show the account.move.line records reconciled in an invoice apr_ids = apr_obj = env['account.partial.reconcile'] am_obj = env['account.move'] aml_ids = env['account.move.line'] act = { 'name': 'Reconciled Lines', 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'res_model': 'account.move.line', 'target': 'current', 'view_mode': 'tree,form' }
accounts = [] accounts.append(record.partner_id.property_account_receivable_id) accounts.append(record.partner_id.property_account_customer_advance_id) accounts.append(record.partner_id.property_account_payable_id) accounts.append(record.partner_id.property_account_supplier_advance_id)
for aml in record.move_id.line_ids.filtered(lambda l: l.account_id in accounts): if aml.account_id.reconcile: aml_ids |= aml apr_ids |= aml.matched_debit_ids | aml.matched_credit_ids
aml_ids |= (apr_ids.mapped('credit_move_id') | apr_ids.mapped('debit_move_id'))
act['domain'] = [('id', 'in', aml_ids.ids)] action = act
